07

What's Missing

Where are the gaps — and what would a PM build next?

缺失了什么

差距在哪里——产品经理下一步该做什么？

Every gap is a product bet waiting to be made

What a product doesn't do is just as telling as what it does. Gaps reveal where the team drew a line — out of time, because the use case wasn't their own, or because the complexity wasn't worth it yet. For a PM, gaps aren't failures — they're a roadmap in disguise.

每个差距都是一个待做的产品押注

产品没有做的事情和它做了的事情同样能说明问题。差距揭示了团队在哪里划定了边界——因为时间不够、因为这个场景不是他们自己的、或者因为当时的复杂度还不值得。对产品经理来说，差距不是失败——而是乔装成问题的路线图。

Four significant gaps in the current product

当前产品的四个重要差距

🌐
No web interface
Requires a terminal or Feishu. Any non-technical job seeker — the majority of the market — can't use it. Largest barrier to broader adoption.
无 Web 界面
需要终端或飞书才能使用。任何没有技术背景的求职者——即市场的大多数——都无法使用。这是更广泛采用的最大障碍。
🔎
No job discovery
Users must bring their own job descriptions. No integration with LinkedIn, Indeed, or job boards. The product starts at step 2 of the job search.
无职位发现功能
用户必须自带职位描述。没有接入LinkedIn、招聘网站或职位板。产品从求职流程的第二步才开始介入。
📄
No resume editing
Generates cover letters and ATS keyword suggestions — but doesn't help update your resume. ATS keywords are identified but not applied.
无简历编辑功能
能生成求职信和ATS关键词建议——但不能帮你更新简历。关键词被识别出来，却无法直接应用。
📬
No application follow-up
History log records what was analyzed, but there's no tracking of application status — no "applied," "phone screen," "offer," "rejected" stages.
无申请跟进
历史记录只保存分析过什么，但没有追踪申请状态——没有"已投递"、"电话面试"、"收到offer"、"被拒"等阶段。

Which gaps are worth closing — and when?

Not every gap is worth filling. A PM scores opportunities by impact, effort, and strategic fit.

哪些差距值得填补——何时填补？

并非所有差距都值得填补。产品经理根据影响力、投入和战略契合度来评分机会。

Web InterfaceWeb 界面 Highest Priority最高优先级
Impact影响力
Very High极高
Effort投入
Medium中等
Strategic Fit战略契合
Very High极高

Core AI logic is already complete. A web UI unlocks the entire non-technical job seeker market — 90%+ of the addressable audience — without changing any underlying logic.

核心 AI 逻辑已完备。Web 界面可以解锁整个非技术求职者市场——潜在受众的90%以上——而无需改变任何底层逻辑。

Resume Tailoring简历定制 High Priority高优先级
Impact影响力
High高
Effort投入
Medium中等
Strategic Fit战略契合
High高

Product already identifies ATS keywords and skill gaps. The logical next step: generate a tailored resume variant per application, closing the loop from analysis to submission.

产品已能识别ATS关键词和技能差距。下一步的逻辑延伸：为每次申请生成定制简历版本，从分析到提交形成完整闭环。

Job Discovery职位发现 Medium Priority中等优先级
Impact影响力
High高
Effort投入
High高
Strategic Fit战略契合
Medium中等

Integrating with job boards would expand into discovery — but it's a different product surface with high effort. Risk: distraction from the proven application-prep core.

与招聘平台整合可拓展到职位发现——但这是一个不同的产品界面，投入高。风险：可能分散对已验证的申请准备核心价值的专注度。

Application Tracker申请状态追踪 Medium Priority中等优先级
Impact影响力
Medium中等
Effort投入
Low低
Strategic Fit战略契合
High高

History log already captures what was analyzed. Extending to track application status (applied, phone screen, offer, rejected) would boost retention at low effort.

历史记录已能捕捉分析内容。扩展为追踪申请状态（已投递、电话面试、收到offer、被拒）将以低投入显著提升留存率。

Think like a PM

产品经理思维练习

You're the PM. You have one engineering sprint. Which opportunity would you prioritize first?

你是产品经理，只有一个工程冲刺。你会优先选择哪个机会？

📋 The PM Takeaway 产品经理的核心洞察
This product is a well-scoped MVP with a clear value loop, honest metrics, clean AI architecture, and a defensible set of trade-offs. Its biggest constraint is accessibility. The next PM bet: bring the same proven AI value to users who've never opened a terminal.
这款产品是一个范围清晰的MVP：价值循环清晰，指标诚实，AI架构干净，权衡取舍有据可依。最大约束是可及性。下一个产品经理押注：把同样经过验证的AI价值带给那些从未打开过终端的用户。
